title: Borden Dent
body: Borden D. Dent (1938–2000) was an American geographer and cartographer who served as professor emeritus and chairman of the Department of Geography and Anthropology at Georgia State University.  His textbook, Cartography: Thematic Map Design, has been one of the seminal texts in the field.
